title: Re:Avaritia: Armor
description: Adds new armor levels to match the Re: Avaritia
body:
# Re-Avaritia Armor

An addon mod for [Re-Avaritia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/re-avaritia) that adds powerful armor sets with unique abilities.

## Features

### 🔥 Infernal Armor (Blaze Armor)
![Blaze Set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/709709e6d5f422be3b992c14d0ad06efeb35f8f3.png)
- Complete fire and lava immunity
- Extinguishes fire when wearing full set
- Grants Fire Resistance effect

### 💎 Crystal Armor
![Crystal Set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2473656bb8c657f96e84a62d6e79e13c529cc13.png)
- Teleportation ability (like Ender Pearl, but without damage)
- Activated by pressing a keybind while sneaking

### ♾️ Infinity Armor Integration
![Integration with Infinity Set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1380802e7242a2b2cdcf12213ec8bb390b9b9fcc.png)
- Infinity Armor from Re-Avaritia inherits ALL properties from both armor sets
- Fire immunity from Infernal Armor
- Teleportation from Crystal Armor
- The ultimate armor combining all abilities

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge 47.0.0+
- [Re-Avaritia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/re-avaritia) 1.3.9.5+

## Installation

1. Install Minecraft Forge 1.20.1
2. Install Re-Avaritia mod
3. Place this mod in your `mods` folder
